title: Opening for Production Engineer at Supreme Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Supreme Industries
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
